pages.title: Constructor
pages.description: Initialize a GT instance with API keys, project settings, default locales, and locale mappings. API reference for Constructor.

pages.title: setConfig
pages.description: Update configuration on an existing GT instance. API reference for setConfig.

pages.title: translate
pages.description: Translate one string or structured content entry into a target locale. API reference for translate.

pages.title: translateMany
pages.description: Translate multiple strings or structured content entries in one request. API reference for translateMany.

pages.title: uploadSourceFiles
pages.description: Upload source files to a project before queueing translation. API reference for uploadSourceFiles.

pages.title: uploadTranslations
pages.description: Upload existing translated files that correspond to source files. API reference for uploadTranslations.

pages.title: enqueueFiles
pages.description: Queue uploaded source files for translation into one or more target locales. API reference for enqueueFiles.

pages.title: awaitJobs
pages.description: Poll queued translation jobs until they complete, fail, or time out. API reference for awaitJobs.

pages.title: checkJobStatus
pages.description: Check the current status of a translation or setup job. API reference for checkJobStatus.

pages.title: queryFileData
pages.description: Check translation status and metadata for uploaded or translated files. API reference for queryFileData.

pages.title: querySourceFile
pages.description: Retrieve source file metadata and related translation information. API reference for querySourceFile.

pages.title: downloadFile
pages.description: Download one translated file after translation is complete. API reference for downloadFile.

pages.title: downloadFileBatch
pages.description: Download multiple translated files in one request. API reference for downloadFileBatch.

pages.title: setupProject
pages.description: Prepare uploaded files for project translation workflows. API reference for setupProject.

pages.title: getProjectData
pages.description: Read project-level metadata and translation configuration. API reference for getProjectData.

pages.title: createTag
pages.description: Create a tag for grouping or identifying file versions. API reference for createTag.

pages.title: formatNum
pages.description: Format numbers, currency, percentages, and numeric values by locale. API reference for formatNum.

pages.title: formatDateTime
pages.description: Format dates and times by locale. API reference for formatDateTime.

pages.title: formatRelativeTime
pages.description: Format relative time values such as minutes ago or days from now. API reference for formatRelativeTime.

pages.title: formatRelativeTimeFromDate
pages.description: Format relative time from a date compared with the current time or another date. API reference for formatRelativeTimeFromDate.

pages.title: formatMessage
pages.description: Format ICU-style messages with variables and locale-aware values. API reference for formatMessage.

pages.title: formatListToParts
pages.description: Format a list into locale-aware parts for custom rendering. API reference for formatListToParts.

pages.title: formatCutoff
pages.description: Truncate text with locale-aware cutoff characters and terminators. API reference for formatCutoff.

pages.title: determineLocale
pages.description: Find the best matching locale from a list of approved locales. API reference for determineLocale.

pages.title: getLocaleDirection
pages.description: Return the text direction for a locale. API reference for getLocaleDirection.

pages.title: getLocaleEmoji
pages.description: Return an emoji marker for a locale or region. API reference for getLocaleEmoji.

pages.title: getLocaleName
pages.description: Return a human-readable locale name. API reference for getLocaleName.

pages.title: getLocaleProperties
pages.description: Return detailed language, script, region, and direction properties for a locale. API reference for getLocaleProperties.

pages.title: getRegionProperties
pages.description: Return region metadata for a locale or region code. API reference for getRegionProperties.

pages.title: isValidLocale
pages.description: Check whether a value is a valid locale code. API reference for isValidLocale.

pages.title: isSameLanguage
pages.description: Check whether two locales share the same base language. API reference for isSameLanguage.

pages.title: isSameDialect
pages.description: Check whether two locales represent the same dialect. API reference for isSameDialect.

pages.title: isSupersetLocale
pages.description: Check whether one locale can represent another more specific locale. API reference for isSupersetLocale.

pages.title: requiresTranslation
pages.description: Check whether translation is needed between two locales. API reference for requiresTranslation.

pages.title: standardizeLocale
pages.description: Normalize a locale code into a standard format. API reference for standardizeLocale.

pages.title: resolveAliasLocale
pages.description: Resolve a locale alias to the locale code used by a custom mapping. API reference for resolveAliasLocale.

pages.title: formatNum
pages.description: Format numbers, currency, percentages, and numeric values without a GT instance. API reference for formatNum.

pages.title: formatDateTime
pages.description: Format dates and times without a GT instance. API reference for formatDateTime.

pages.title: formatRelativeTime
pages.description: Format relative time values without a GT instance. API reference for formatRelativeTime.

pages.title: formatRelativeTimeFromDate
pages.description: Format relative time from a date without a GT instance. API reference for formatRelativeTimeFromDate.

pages.title: formatMessage
pages.description: Format ICU-style messages without a GT instance. API reference for formatMessage.

pages.title: formatListToParts
pages.description: Format a list into locale-aware parts without a GT instance. API reference for formatListToParts.

pages.title: formatCutoff
pages.description: Truncate text with locale-aware cutoff characters without a GT instance. API reference for formatCutoff.

pages.title: determineLocale
pages.description: Find the best matching locale without a GT instance. API reference for determineLocale.

pages.title: getLocaleDirection
pages.description: Return text direction for a locale without a GT instance. API reference for getLocaleDirection.

pages.title: getLocaleEmoji
pages.description: Return an emoji marker for a locale or region without a GT instance. API reference for getLocaleEmoji.

pages.title: getLocaleName
pages.description: Return a human-readable locale name without a GT instance. API reference for getLocaleName.

pages.title: getLocaleProperties
pages.description: Return detailed locale properties without a GT instance. API reference for getLocaleProperties.

pages.title: getRegionProperties
pages.description: Return region metadata without a GT instance. API reference for getRegionProperties.

pages.description: Check whether a value is a valid locale code without a GT instance. API reference for isValidLocale.

pages.title: isSameLanguage
pages.description: Check whether two locales share the same base language without a GT instance. API reference for isSameLanguage.

pages.title: isSameDialect
pages.description: Check whether two locales represent the same dialect without a GT instance. API reference for isSameDialect.

pages.title: isSupersetLocale
pages.description: Check whether one locale can represent another more specific locale without a GT instance. API reference for isSupersetLocale.

pages.title: requiresTranslation
pages.description: Check whether translation is needed between two locales without a GT instance. API reference for requiresTranslation.

pages.title: standardizeLocale
pages.description: Normalize a locale code into a standard format without a GT instance. API reference for standardizeLocale.

pages.title: resolveAliasLocale
pages.description: Resolve a locale alias to the locale code used by a custom mapping without a GT instance. API reference for resolveAliasLocale.

pages.title: Content
pages.description: Supported content formats for translation. API reference for Content type.

pages.title: CustomMapping
pages.description: Custom locale mappings and locale property overrides. API reference for CustomMapping type.

pages.title: DataFormat
pages.description: Supported translation data format values. API reference for DataFormat type.

pages.title: EnqueueFilesOptions
pages.description: Options for queueing uploaded files for translation. API reference for EnqueueFilesOptions type.

pages.title: EntryMetadata
pages.description: Metadata for adding context to string translation entries. API reference for EntryMetadata type.

pages.title: TranslateManyEntry
pages.description: Input shape for translate and translateMany entries. API reference for TranslateManyEntry type.

pages.title: FileToTranslate
pages.description: File input structure for file translation workflows. API reference for FileToTranslate type.

pages.title: GTConstructorParams
pages.description: Configuration options accepted by the GT constructor. API reference for GTConstructorParams type.

pages.title: JsxChildren
pages.description: JSX content structure for translatable children. API reference for JsxChildren type.

pages.title: JsxElement
pages.description: Structured JSX-like element used in translatable content. API reference for JsxElement type.

pages.title: LocaleProperties
pages.description: Language, script, region, and direction metadata for a locale. API reference for LocaleProperties type.

pages.title: TranslateManyResult
pages.description: Result array returned by batch translation. API reference for TranslateManyResult type.

pages.title: TranslationResult
pages.description: Success or error result returned by translation methods. API reference for TranslationResult type.

pages.title: Variable
pages.description: Placeholder for dynamic content in translatable messages. API reference for Variable type.
